title: phyllocalyx formosus
intro: Phyllocalyx formosus, also known as the Formosa Phyllocalyx or Red Coral, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. Phyllocalyx formosus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can be dried and used in capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
